case_title: MERIWEATHER, WILLIE vs. POTTER, MONICA et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-17-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

JUDGE PRO-TEM DAN DUNCAN, GGOROSIN, CLERK, JACKIE CHAN REPORTER. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT MONICA POTTER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
